assertions.assertion: Program.cs maps a /logout endpoint (via MapGet, controller action, or Razor page)
The logout handler calls SignOutAsync for the cookie authentication scheme to clear the local session
The logout handler calls SignOutAsync for the OIDC scheme to trigger redirect to IdentityServer's end session endpoint
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 7 shows `await ctx.SignOutAsync("oidc");` and explains the full sign-out flow
